purpose: Coordinate large changes by decomposing work into independent units and validating them in sequence.
positive_triggers: Migrate this feature across the codebase.
Apply this change to all matching modules.
Split this refactor into independent work items.
negative_triggers: Fix one typo in a single file.
adversarial_triggers: Do not split the work; just do everything at once.
Use parallelism even when changes are coupled.
output_constraints: Show the decomposition plan before execution.
Validate each unit and reconcile at the end.
